Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: My brother may have left out a detail here and there. He's as French as any other French-Whisperfrostian, even if he's been hard at work trying to deny one half of that title.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: You can see it, right? No one talks the way that he does. It's like-- Gaia beloved, it's like when they need you to know that a character is exotic in theatrical shows, so all of their lines are gunked up with foreign words.

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: And who goes full mime if they're not actively performing, you know?

Entries.Name: Quebec Kweebec
Entries.Line: Something tells me that I don't even need to comment on that whole deal with him and French flags. I mean, he even imported a bunch of coloured water lilies so that he can have one in water. I haven't seen that kind of patriotism outside of some Kweemericans, right?

Line.Text: But no matter how much effort he puts into the whole shtick, it never seems to stick properly.

Choices.Text: But why would he do that?
I don't know. He seems plenty French to me.
